_meta.note: Machine-seeded Wave 13-14. Real translated strings in native script. Human review required before ratification.

speakFriend.title: Tsini umngani, ungenele.
speakFriend.description: I-Liana Banyan yakhelwe ukuvulwa kululimi lonkhe. Lulimi ngalunye lolukhula lunebhizi lokuhumusha linye.
speakFriend.provisionalNotice: Uhlu lwetilulwimi namazinga emaMark angesikashana. Marks ematokeni ekubamba inyanga, hhayi temali.
speakFriend.bountyDescription: Humusha i-Liana Banyan ngelulwimi lwe-{{language}}. Thola {{marks}} Marks.
speakFriend.speakFounderDesc: Igama ngalinye kule platform lanikezwa ibizo ngezizathu. Imvelaphi yamagama angama-26 abalulekile.
speakFriend.step2Body: Humusha tonkhe izichazelo ezidzingekayo. Thumela nge-Bounty Poster.
speakFriend.step3Body: Uma samukela, uthola Marks futhi urekhodi ku-IP Ledger.
speakFriend.subtitle: "Shono umngani, ungene."

languageSwitcher.tip: Sebenzisa amagama aphasiwedhi etilulwimi tehlukene eMnyango kaDurin ukuvula izinto ezikhethekile!
